title: stephania discolor var. hernandiifolia
intro: Stephania discolor var. hernandiifolia, also known as the "Stephania Herba" or "Yan Hu Suo", is a plant species belonging to the Menispermaceae family. It is a type of rhizome used in traditional Chinese medicine, known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, analgesic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits associated with Stephania discolor var. hernandiifolia include relief from pain and spasms, improved circulation, and potential treatment for conditions such as epilepsy and sciatica. In herbal preparations, Stephania discolor var. hernandiifolia is often used as a dried rhizome, decocted in water or combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
